data.title: Suger.io raises big money to expand cloud marketplace automation
data.description: Since its founding in 2022, Suger.io has rapidly grown, quadrupling its annual recurring revenue in 2024 and scaling to around 200 customers, including Snowflake, Intel, Fivetran, DBT Labs, Notion, and ContentSquare.

data.title: Wesco pushes ahead with $500 million digital transformation plans
data.description: Key achievements so far include the integration of generative AI analytics, automation of order fulfillment, and improvements in working capital efficiency.

data.title: MarketLeap snares $8 million to expand AI-driven ecommerce platform
data.description: With the new funding, MarketLeap plans to enhance AI-driven automation and real-time analytics while expanding its presence in the U.S.

data.title: BigCommerce adds a chief revenue officer and a CMO to executive management
data.description: BigCommerce CEO Travis Hess says the appointments strengthen the company’s executive leadership team as it focuses on accelerating growth.

data.title: Wayfair debuts Muse, its new AI-powered search and discovery tool
data.description: Muse will build off of Wayfair's previous pilot with its Decorify app, giving shoppers the option to upload images and reimagine rooms.
